data.title: stub-fail Output
data.description: Output produced by the stub-fail worker (captured in task history even on failure).

httpStatus.title: HTTP Status Code
httpStatus.description: The configured status code that was triggered.

retryable.title: Retryable
retryable.description: True if the failure is retryable (429/500/503); false for terminal failure (400).

correlationId.title: Correlation ID
correlationId.description: The correlation ID passed in, echoed back.
